summary: Completed testing of BIBI Cars CRM Manager Price Override + Audit system. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success), VIN Intelligence flow functional, but frontend admin navigation has routing issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Calculator Admin and VIN Search admin pages not accessible via navigation menu - redirects to homepage

integration_issues.issue: Navigation from dashboard to Calculator Admin page fails - redirects to homepage instead

passed_tests: VIN Intelligence Flow with test VINs (BMW WBA3B3C50EF123456 $8500, Honda 1HGCV1F34KA000001 $12500)
Full audit trail and history tracking
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin panel routing - Calculator Admin and VIN Search pages are not accessible via navigation menu (redirects to homepage). All backend APIs are working perfectly, but frontend navigation needs to be fixed for admin users to access these features.

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (VIN search working, admin login working, but admin navigation broken)
